papers.title: EVADE-Bench: Expert-Curated Chinese Multimodal Benchmark for Evasive Content Detection in E-Commerce

score.rationale_zh: 强相关：直接面向电商场景中的规避式违规内容检测，覆盖文本和图片两种模态。方法形态更偏 benchmark 和评测协议，模型创新不是最高，但数据构造、专家标注、违规类别覆盖对达人/内容治理价值很高。公开检索未发现可用代码仓库，因此本次提供 toy but runnable 的 PyTorch 复现。

zh.method_overview: EVADE-Bench 针对电商内容治理中常见的“规避式表达”建立多模态评测基准，覆盖中文文本与商品/直播图像中的隐晦违规线索。它把检测任务拆成违规识别、违规类别判断、跨模态一致性和规避区域定位，强调 LLM/VLM 在真实电商审核中的鲁棒性。高光点是将电商治理里最难的变体表达、图文错配、视觉遮挡等问题抽象成可评测 benchmark。
zh.story: 传统内容审核容易依赖单模态关键词或显著视觉特征，遇到谐音、拆字、遮挡、图文错配时容易漏检 -> 需要一个同时覆盖文本、图像和跨模态一致性的专家标注基准 -> EVADE-Bench 用多违规类别和规避样式衡量 LLM/VLM 的治理鲁棒性。
zh.innovation: 创新点主要在 benchmark 定义和数据治理价值，而不是提出新的大模型结构。与普通内容安全集不同，它聚焦电商语境下的规避表达，并把文本样本、图像样本和违规类别统一在同一个评估框架中；这非常适合迁移到达人直播切片、商品卡、评论和短视频封面审核。
zh.key_metrics: 公开摘要显示数据集包含 2,833 条标注文本、13,961 张标注图片，覆盖 6 类违规类别。由于未拿到完整论文表格，本次不虚构 SOTA 数字；本地复现脚本报告 category accuracy、violation accuracy、cross-modal consistency accuracy 和 evasion-mask IoU。

en.method_overview: EVADE-Bench builds a multimodal benchmark for evasive violation detection in Chinese e-commerce content. It evaluates text, image, cross-modal consistency, and evasive-region localization, stressing robustness of LLMs/VLMs under disguised policy violations. Its highlight is turning practical e-commerce moderation failure modes into measurable benchmark tasks.
en.story: Keyword or single-modal moderation misses homophones, split words, occlusion, and image-text mismatch -> a benchmark must evaluate text, vision, and cross-modal consistency together -> EVADE-Bench measures LLM/VLM robustness on expert-curated e-commerce evasions.
en.innovation: The novelty is benchmark and governance design rather than a new model architecture. Unlike generic moderation datasets, it focuses on evasive e-commerce expressions and unifies text/image/category evaluation in one protocol.
en.key_metrics: The public snippet reports 2,833 annotated text samples, 13,961 annotated images, and six violation categories. Full SOTA numbers were not visible in the accessible snippet; the local reproduction reports category accuracy, violation accuracy, cross-modal consistency accuracy, and evasion-mask IoU.

papers.title: Hierarchical Denoising For Multi-Step Visual Reasoning
papers.source: arXiv / MLLM visual reasoning / weakly related hot paper

score.rationale_zh: 方法创新和效率指标非常亮眼，但与电商内容治理只是弱相关，主要可迁移到商品图多步变化理解、复杂短视频状态推理和视觉链路解释，因此未达到复现阈值。

zh.method_overview: HDR 把多步视觉推理中的视频/视觉状态建模成树状层级 latent，先在粗层保留不确定假设做全局规划，再在细层逐步细化成可输出视觉状态。它用稀疏层级注意力降低时间维度计算，并保持流式输出能力。高光点是兼顾全局修订能力和低延迟推理。
zh.story: 自回归流式扩散推理快但缺少全局修订，双向扩散能全局修订但代价高 -> 需要粗到细的中间视觉规划结构 -> HDR 用层级 latent 与稀疏注意力实现多步视觉推理。
zh.innovation: 区别于单层 latent 或逐帧密集去噪，HDR 把推理状态显式层级化，让模型先计划再细化。这个设计合理，尤其适合复杂状态演进，但迁移到电商治理需要把任务改造成商品/短视频状态序列。
zh.key_metrics: arXiv 摘要报告：相对流式自回归扩散 baseline，成功率从 34.22 提升到 60.29，平均进度从 76.00 提升到 89.56；推理延迟 0.70 秒/latent，比双向扩散快 54.2 倍；仅用 2% 训练数据保留 82.9% 全量性能。

en.method_overview: HDR introduces tree-structured hierarchical latents for multi-step visual reasoning. Coarse layers preserve uncertain hypotheses for global planning, while fine layers refine concrete visual states, and sparse hierarchical attention reduces temporal cost.
en.story: Streaming autoregressive diffusion is fast but weak at global revision, while bidirectional diffusion is costly -> introduce coarse-to-fine visual planning -> use hierarchical latents and sparse attention for consistent reasoning trajectories.
en.innovation: Unlike flat latent denoising or dense frame-level revision, HDR explicitly separates planning and refinement. The design is plausible for visual state evolution, though e-commerce transfer is indirect.
en.key_metrics: The abstract reports success improving from 34.22 to 60.29, average progress from 76.00 to 89.56, 0.70 seconds per latent, 54.2× faster inference than bidirectional diffusion, and 82.9% full-data performance with 2% training data.

papers.title: SciDiagramEdit: Learning to Edit Scientific Diagrams from Paper Revisions
papers.source: arXiv / Agentic visual editing / weakly related

score.rationale_zh: 从论文版本历史挖掘可编辑图像修订信号很新颖，但目标是科研图编辑，和电商治理的关系主要在商品图/营销图编辑审查、素材自动修订与图文可编辑表示。

zh.method_overview: SciDiagramEdit 从 arXiv 论文版本历史中挖掘 before/after 图表修订对，并把作者修订意图作为自然语言编辑指令。它让 agent 在可编辑矢量源上操作，并通过 skill evolution 从执行轨迹中持续改进技能描述。高光点是把真实修订历史转化成指令式图编辑训练信号。
zh.story: 图表编辑需要理解元素、排版和语义，但人工构造数据成本高 -> 论文修订天然包含前后版本和修改意图 -> 用修订历史训练可协作的图编辑 agent。
zh.innovation: 区别于合成编辑数据，它使用真实论文修订历史作为监督来源，并把可编辑 vector primitive 暴露给 agent。思路可行，但对电商图片编辑需要重新构建商品图/营销图修订数据。
zh.key_metrics: 摘要称 skill evolution 在 held-out validation set 上持续提升 edit accuracy，但可访问摘要未给出具体数值，因此评分中实验指标保守处理。

en.method_overview: SciDiagramEdit mines before/after figure pairs from arXiv paper revision histories and grounds edits in authors' revision intent. An agent operates on editable vector sources and improves via skill evolution from execution traces.
en.story: Instruction-driven diagram editing lacks realistic data -> paper revisions naturally provide before/after figures and intent -> train an editable-source agent that evolves its skills.
en.innovation: The novelty is using natural paper revisions instead of synthetic edits and exposing vector primitives for co-editing. E-commerce transfer requires analogous product/marketing revision data.
en.key_metrics: The abstract states skill evolution improves edit accuracy on a held-out validation set, but the accessible snippet does not expose exact numbers.

papers.title: TikStance: A Multimodal and Hierarchical Dataset for Multi-target Stance Analysis in TikTok Political Conversations
papers.source: arXiv / Social content understanding / creator governance adjacent

score.rationale_zh: 不是电商论文，但短视频平台、多模态内容、评论树和多目标立场标注对达人治理、直播评论风险理解、舆情/争议内容分析有参考价值。

zh.method_overview: TikStance 构建 TikTok 政治对话中的多模态、多层级立场分析数据集，把 host video、元数据、父子评论树和多目标立场标签关联起来。它同时标注视频到目标、评论到目标的 Favor/Against/None 立场。高光点是保留短视频语境和层级评论结构。
zh.story: 短视频讨论不只是单条文本，视频、元数据和评论树共同决定语义 -> 需要保留上下文和多目标标签的数据集 -> TikStance 用多模态与层级对话支持 stance analysis。
zh.innovation: 创新主要在数据结构完整性：同时保留视频、评论树、多目标标签和人工一致性。迁移到达人治理时，可用于商品/达人争议话题、直播间评论链路和风险观点识别。
zh.key_metrics: 摘要报告数据集包含 161 个视频、13,876 条评论；最终 Krippendorff's α 在三个目标子集上分别达到 0.743、0.723、0.722；嵌套回复占所有评论的 23.3%。

en.method_overview: TikStance is a multimodal hierarchical dataset for stance analysis in TikTok conversations. It links host videos, metadata, parent-linked comment trees, and multi-target Favor/Against/None labels.
en.story: Short-video discourse depends on video context and comment hierarchy, not isolated text -> preserve audiovisual and conversational context -> build a multi-target stance dataset.
en.innovation: The key novelty is dataset structure: video context, hierarchical replies, multi-target labels, and reliability measurement. It is useful for creator-governance transfer despite its political domain.
en.key_metrics: The abstract reports 161 videos, 13,876 comments, Krippendorff's α of 0.743/0.723/0.722 across target subsets, and nested replies accounting for 23.3% of comments.

papers.title: Unified Multi-Task Relevance Modeling for E-Commerce: Comparing Task Routing Architectures Across LLMs and Cross-Encoders

score.rationale_zh: 强电商相关，统一多任务相关性建模对商品、内容、广告、达人素材召回/排序都有价值；但不是今日新论文，且方法偏系统性对比而非全新结构，因此列为 carry-over，未达到本次新增复现阈值。

zh.method_overview: 该论文把电商中的六类 entity-pair 相关性任务放进统一多任务框架，并使用共享三档相关性标尺共同训练。它系统比较 LLM LoRA 方案与 cross-encoder 全量微调方案下的任务路由结构。高光点是给出实际电商 relevance 系统中任务路由架构选择的可操作经验。
zh.story: 电商搜索/推荐/广告存在多种相关性任务，各自训练会导致低资源任务弱、标签体系不统一 -> 需要共享相关性标尺和多任务训练 -> 比较不同 task routing 架构找到适合 LLM 与 cross-encoder 的方案。
zh.innovation: 创新在工程系统整合和任务路由对比，不是提出单一新模型。它与现有单任务 relevance 模型不同，强调统一标尺、多任务共享和模型家族差异化路由选择，落地可行性强。
zh.key_metrics: 搜索摘要报告多任务训练在低资源任务上相对单任务 baseline 最高带来 +14% 提升。完整指标需要阅读全文表格确认，因此本次只引用该公开摘要可见数字。

en.method_overview: The paper unifies six e-commerce entity-pair relevance tasks under a shared three-point relevance scale and compares task-routing architectures across LoRA-adapted LLMs and fine-tuned cross-encoders.
en.story: E-commerce relevance tasks are fragmented and low-resource tasks underperform -> train them jointly with a shared relevance scale -> compare routing architectures for LLM and cross-encoder families.
en.innovation: The novelty is practical system unification and routing comparison rather than a single new architecture. It is highly actionable for production relevance modeling.
en.key_metrics: The public search snippet reports up to +14% improvement on low-resource tasks over single-task baselines. Full table-level numbers require paper reading.
